response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a concert performance of 'Jouya Repaint' by members of the VTuber group 秘密結社holoX. 2. Performer changes at 00:27, 02:35, and 04:53 were used to define scenes. 3. Used web search to confirm the song title and obtain the official Japanese lyrics for 'Jouya Repaint'. 4. Verified the song title 'Jouya Repaint' and original artist as 秘密結社holoX. 5. Constructing the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A concert performance featuring the song 'Jouya Repaint' by members of the VTuber group 秘密結社holoX (Secret Society holoX). The song is performed by La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha.

scenes.description: La+ Darknesss performs the opening section of 'Jouya Repaint'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「 そこ に 跪け ！ 」
「 吐い て 捨てる よう な 現実 を 」

「 holox ! ! 」
